summary: Frontend testing for Desa Melikan (Node/Express/EJS SSR). Verified public pages, auth flow, dashboard, and all CRUD operations. App is functioning correctly. All issues found are non-blocking.

integration_issues.issue: Cloudflare bot detection occasionally intercepts automated multipart/form-data POSTs from headless browser, causing intermittent 'session loss' (redirect to /auth/login). Validated via curl that backend session+CRUD work perfectly. NOT an app bug, but test environment artifact.

issues: Tailwind CSS is loaded from CDN (cdn.tailwindcss.com). Browser console warns this should not be used in production. Recommend Tailwind CLI/PostCSS build for production deployment.
Login page footer hint exposes default credentials (admin@desa.id / admin123) - acceptable for demo/seed but should be removed before going live.

admin_flows.berita_create: PASS (verified via Playwright + curl, new entry appears in list)
admin_flows.video_create_youtube: PASS (verified via curl with field name youtubeInput)
admin_flows.profil_form_loads: PASS (fields: namaDesa, sejarah, visi, misi, statistik, struktur, info wilayah)
admin_flows.kontak_form_loads: PASS (fields: alamat, telepon, email, whatsapp, fb, ig, yt, gMaps, jamPelayanan)

action_items: Optional: Move Tailwind from CDN to PostCSS build for production (current setup uses cdn.tailwindcss.com - console warning).
Optional: Hide/disable default credentials hint on login page before production release.
No code fixes needed - backend and frontend integration is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: session.cookie.secure not set; works behind proxy because secure=false. If production enforces HTTPS-only cookies, set 'trust proxy' and cookie.secure=true.
Auth uses session.admin; logout uses both GET and POST /auth/logout (GET logout is convenient but technically should be POST-only to avoid CSRF via image tags). Low priority.
Video tambah field is 'youtubeInput' (radio 'tipe' chooses youtube/file). EJS view labels match controller expectations - integration verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% via curl validation; ~80% via Playwright due to Cloudflare bot detection on multipart POST

seed_data_creation: App auto-seeds via utils/seed.js on boot: 1 admin, profil desa, kontak desa, 5 berita, 6 potensi, 8 galeri, 1 video. Test artifacts: TEST curl Video, TEST Potensi curl, TEST Aspirasi 2 may remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server is Node/Express+EJS SSR on port 3000. Backend confirmed functional via curl. Playwright multipart POSTs sometimes trigger Cloudflare challenge causing intermittent 302->/auth/login in tests; not an app bug. Use curl with -c/-b cookies to validate POST flows. Video form uses field name 'youtubeInput' for YouTube URL, with 'tipe' radio button (youtube/file). Field names: berita(judul/kategori/penulis/ringkasan/konten/gambar/published), potensi(nama/kategori/deskripsi/lokasi/harga/kontak/gambar/featured), kontak(alamat/telepon/email/whatsapp/facebook/instagram/youtube/website/jamPelayanan/googleMapsEmbed), profil(namaDesa/tagline/sejarah/visi/misi/statistik_*/struktur_*/wilayah fields).
rca_of_the_issue: Initial Playwright run showed cascade of failures after first CRUD Berita create due to Cloudflare bot management cookie invalidation during automated multipart submissions. Independent verification via curl confirmed: login -> POST multipart create (200) -> entry persists in list. Subsequent Playwright run with same flow also passed. Conclusion: NO app bug; intermittent test infrastructure issue with Cloudflare + headless browser multipart POST.
